description: Composition Khaki chinos made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, a zipper and button closure, belt loops on the waistband, two pockets on the sides and two pockets on the back Fit Slim Wash care Hand wash or machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately Tumble dry low Do not bleach Warm iron The man of style always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it all the easier with this classsy range of chinos. Designed with the choicest of fabrics, they make for perfect casual wear when paired with a checked shirt. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
